headline: Could your symptoms be neuroplastic?
body:
Scans clear, but symptoms still here?

Take the FIT quiz to see if they are likely neuroplastic.
caption:
You have had the scans. You have heard the words everything looks normal. And yet the symptoms are still here.

If that sounds familiar, your symptoms may be neuroplastic, driven by a sensitised nervous system rather than ongoing damage. The Neurowaze FIT quiz is a short self-assessment that helps you find out.

It is built for people living with chronic pain, fatigue, fibromyalgia, IBS, tinnitus and long COVID who have been left without answers. In a few minutes it shows whether a neuroplastic approach is likely to help.

It is free, and it is a good first step. Take the FIT quiz at https://neurowaze.health

#ChronicPain #Neuroplasticity #Fibromyalgia #IBS #Tinnitus #LongCovid #Fatigue #MindBody #PainRecovery #Neurowaze
first_comment: Take the FIT quiz here: https://neurowaze.health  It is a short, free self-assessment to see whether your symptoms are likely neuroplastic.
